citation_insertion_plan.allowed_claim: VF-H2 uses graph-like discrete state-update language.
citation_insertion_plan.forbidden_claim: VF-H2 is validated or formally equivalent to parallel dynamical systems.
citation_insertion_plan.planned_sentence_role: Support broad framing of graph-based discrete dynamical systems.
citation_insertion_plan.target_section: Related Work / Graph Dynamical Systems and Discrete Network Dynamics

citation_insertion_plan.allowed_claim: Finite dynamical systems are relevant background for discrete simulation frameworks.
citation_insertion_plan.forbidden_claim: The source validates VF-H2 or the Viruse Fabric theory.
citation_insertion_plan.planned_sentence_role: Support finite dynamical systems as a simulation framework.
citation_insertion_plan.target_section: Related Work / Graph Dynamical Systems and Discrete Network Dynamics

citation_insertion_plan.allowed_claim: Temporal-network literature provides conceptual background for time-indexed network processes.
citation_insertion_plan.forbidden_claim: The source validates the VF-H2 three-time coordinate.
citation_insertion_plan.planned_sentence_role: Support cautious discussion of temporal networks and time-indexed graph processes.
citation_insertion_plan.target_section: Related Work / Temporal Networks and Multi-Time Indexing

citation_insertion_plan.allowed_claim: Network memory can be structured, motivating careful treatment of memory mechanisms.
citation_insertion_plan.forbidden_claim: The source validates persistent memory ledger or ledger_effect_size.
citation_insertion_plan.planned_sentence_role: Support the idea that memory in temporal networks can be structured and nontrivial.
citation_insertion_plan.target_section: Related Work / Memory and Non-Markovian Processes in Networks

citation_insertion_plan.allowed_claim: Higher-order network models are relevant conceptual background for history-sensitive network processes.
citation_insertion_plan.forbidden_claim: VF-H2 is a higher-order network model or is validated by this source.
citation_insertion_plan.planned_sentence_role: Support broad framing of path/history-dependent network representations.
citation_insertion_plan.target_section: Related Work / Memory and Non-Markovian Processes in Networks

citation_insertion_plan.allowed_claim: Memory can alter dynamics in cellular automata, useful as toy/rule-system context.
citation_insertion_plan.forbidden_claim: VF-H2 is a cellular automaton or is formally equivalent to one.
citation_insertion_plan.target_section: Related Work / Memory-Augmented Automata and Rule-Based Toy Systems

citation_insertion_plan.allowed_claim: Reservoir-style systems offer memory-bearing recurrent-state vocabulary.
citation_insertion_plan.forbidden_claim: VF-H2 is an echo state network or reservoir computing model.
citation_insertion_plan.planned_sentence_role: Support echo-state/reservoir terminology as an analogy only.
citation_insertion_plan.target_section: Related Work / Reservoir-Style Memory and Recurrent State Analogies

citation_insertion_plan.allowed_claim: Memory capacity is a term used in echo-state/reservoir contexts.
citation_insertion_plan.planned_sentence_role: Support cautious memory-capacity terminology in reservoir-style systems.
citation_insertion_plan.target_section: Related Work / Reservoir-Style Memory and Recurrent State Analogies

citation_insertion_plan.allowed_claim: Null models can be used as methodological comparison tools.
citation_insertion_plan.forbidden_claim: Null models prove VF-H2 or validate the no-persistent-memory null control.
citation_insertion_plan.planned_sentence_role: Support null models as benchmarking tools in network contexts.
citation_insertion_plan.target_section: Related Work / Null Models, Ablation, Robustness, and Artifact Checks

citation_insertion_plan.allowed_claim: Reproducibility is a recognized concern in computational research.
citation_insertion_plan.forbidden_claim: VF-H2 has external replication or empirical validation.
citation_insertion_plan.planned_sentence_role: Support general reproducibility motivation in computational work.
citation_insertion_plan.target_section: Related Work / Null Models, Ablation, Robustness, and Artifact Checks

citation_insertion_plan.allowed_claim: Structured robustness assessment is a relevant methodological concern.
citation_insertion_plan.forbidden_claim: VF-H2 has independent empirical validation or field-level replication.
citation_insertion_plan.planned_sentence_role: Support structured robustness or replicability discussion with domain caution.
citation_insertion_plan.target_section: Related Work / Null Models, Ablation, Robustness, and Artifact Checks

plan_text:
# Citation Insertion Plan v1

## Status

Scope: draft-citation-insertion-plan-from-verified-sources-no-claim-validation

This artifact creates a citation insertion plan only. It does not insert citations into the technical note, does not add references, does not create a bibliography, does not claim literature support, does not claim validation, and does not claim manuscript readiness.

## Plan Summary

- planned_citation_insertion_count: 11
- excluded_source_count: 3
- citation_inserted_count: 0
- reference_added_count: 0
- bibliography_created: False
- literature_support_claim_made: False
- literature_validation_claim_made: False

## Planned Citation Roles

All planned citations are limited to one of these roles:

- background only
- terminology support only
- conceptual positioning only
- methodological framing only

No planned citation may be used for VF-H2 validation, Viruse Fabric theory validation, formal proof, empirical validation, biological validation, external validation, manuscript readiness, or submission readiness.

## Boundary

This plan does not modify the limited technical note. It does not insert citation keys into prose. It does not add a reference list. It only records where verified sources may later be inserted after a separate citation-insertion execution step.

## Excluded Sources

- SRC-CAND-NM-002 remains rejected for current related work due biological/epidemic boundary risk.
- SRC-CAND-CA-001 remains held pending final bibliographic verification.
- SRC-CAND-ALIFE-001 remains held pending scope and citation-quality review.

## Safety Boundary

Safe abstract toy model only. No real biological datasets, no real pathogen models, no receptor parameters, no operational targeting, no wet-lab protocol, no infectivity optimization, no immune evasion optimization, and no host range prediction are introduced.

## Next Allowed Action

execute_citation_insertion_into_related_work_draft_no_claim_validation
